seed_problem: Pack polyominoes into a W x H board maximizing covered area (score = 1e5*sum(k)/(W*H)), reflections allowed; checker validates no-overlap and in-bounds.
mutation: composite: generalize the input from an empty board to an obstructed rooftop with scattered blocked tiles, and tighten the output with bounded per-shape supplies (a two-dimensional bounded-supply knapsack), so a single dominant piece cannot tile the roof and value-density / orientation-search / gap-filling strategies diverge.
title: Skyline Sprouts: Rooftop Garden Bed Packing
strategies: sparse reference baseline: place 2x2 squares on a coarse lattice (the calibration point)
value-density greedy: scan tiles row-major, place the largest-area piece that fits in its default orientation subject to remaining supply
orientation-search greedy with gap-filling: try all 8 dihedral orientations of each piece largest-first, then fill leftover gaps with scarce dominoes and monominoes
multi-order local search / restarts: retry the constructive pass under several deterministic shape orderings and keep the best-covering packing
